# kong-gateway_rbac_role_endpoint (Resource)

RbacRoleEndpoint Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kong-gateway_rbac_role_endpoint" "my_rbacroleendpoint" {
  actions = [
    "..."
  ]
  comment    = "...my_comment..."
  created_at = 5
  endpoint   = "...my_endpoint..."
  negative   = false
  role_id    = "...my_role_id..."
  updated_at = 10
  workspace  = "team-payments"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Set of String) Requires replacement if changed.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Additional comment or description for the RBAC role endpoint. Requires replacement if changed.
- `created_at` (Number) Unix epoch when the resource was created. Requires replacement if changed.
- `endpoint` (String) The endpoint associated with the RBAC role. Requires replacement if changed.
- `negative` (Boolean) Indicates whether the RBAC role has negative permissions for the endpoint. Requires replacement if changed.
- `role_id` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `updated_at` (Number) Unix epoch when the resource was last updated. Requires replacement if changed.
- `workspace` (String) The name of the workspace. Default: "default"; Requires replacement if changed.
